allow: Bash(xcodebuild -project TheHealthCoachV2.xcodeproj -scheme TheHealthCoachV2 -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16 Pro' -configuration Debug build)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'index=%{http_code} physical=%{http_code} mental=%{http_code} data=%{http_code}\\n' http://127.0.0.1:8765/index.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/physical.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/mental.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/assets/data.js)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'index=%{http_code} physical=%{http_code} mental=%{http_code} css=%{http_code} app=%{http_code} data=%{http_code}\\n' http://127.0.0.1:8765/index.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/physical.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/mental.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/assets/styles.css http://127.0.0.1:8765/assets/app.js http://127.0.0.1:8765/assets/data.js)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'index=%{http_code} physical=%{http_code} mental=%{http_code} css=%{http_code}\\n' http://127.0.0.1:8765/index.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/physical.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/mental.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/assets/styles.css)
Bash(sed -i '' 's|styles\\.css?v=[0-9]*|styles.css?v=8|g; s|app\\.js?v=[0-9]*|app.js?v=8|g; s|data\\.js?v=[0-9]*|data.js?v=8|g' index.html physical.html mental.html)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'v=8 → index=%{http_code} physical=%{http_code} mental=%{http_code}\\n' http://127.0.0.1:8765/index.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/physical.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/mental.html)
Bash(sed -i '' 's|styles\\.css?v=[0-9]*|styles.css?v=9|g; s|app\\.js?v=[0-9]*|app.js?v=9|g; s|data\\.js?v=[0-9]*|data.js?v=9|g' index.html physical.html mental.html)

Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'v=9 → index=%{http_code} physical=%{http_code} mental=%{http_code} css=%{http_code}\\n' http://127.0.0.1:8765/index.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/physical.html http://127.0.0.1:8765/mental.html 'http://127.0.0.1:8765/assets/styles.css?v=9')
